examples: Some believe NGF can reduce neural degeneration.
This protein is called nerve growth factor (NGF).
It's as if NGF amplifies the pain message to the brain.
Now the second NGF-1 antibody, from Regeneron and Sanofi-Aventis, has been put on ice, too.
The researchers will take cells called fibroblasts from the patients' skin and genetically engineer them to produce NGF.
